data.name: Escape from Vampire Castle: Miss Luna's Diary
data.detailed_description:
[STORY]

This is Vampire Castle.

A traveler who came here not knowing that

Vampire A smiled.

Oh, look at all that delicious food we've got.

Now, how can I scare you, my dear?

I can't wait to see the looks of terror and despair on their faces.

[Overview].

This game is a survival escape game from vampires.

Hide in the shadows to avoid being found by the vampires.

Find the items you need to escape in the mansion.

Find objects where you can hide.

Listen carefully because the closer the enemy gets, the louder the footsteps become.

If you hear the sound, hide in the shadows.

Will you make it back alive in one piece?

data.short_description: This game is an escape game about survival from vampires. Hide in the shadows to avoid being found by the vampires and search for effective items in the mansion. To survive, find the items you need to escape.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 韓文, 法文, 德文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64 Bit)
  • 處理器: corei5 8400
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDA GEFORCE 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64 Bit)
  • 處理器: corei5 8400
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDA GEFORCE 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Ventura 13.0
  • 處理器: Apple M2
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Ventura 13.0
  • 處理器: Apple M2
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
